title: Town Crier Newsletter
content:
Town Crier Newsletter
The
Town Crier
newsletter shares announcements and advertising for organizations, businesses, and events in Annapolis Royal. For more information, please contact
admin@annapolisroyal.com
.
Please send all electronic submissions to
admin@annapolisroyal.com
. The deadline varies each month but generally falls around the middle of the month for the following month’s publication. The exact date is listed in the Town Crier newsletter each month.
To sign-up to receive the newsletter electronically, please submit your email address in the “Newsletter Sign-Up” section at the bottom of this page.
